global.description: The ad features a blue gradient background with a prominent logo and call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to engage with the FluxStream app.

elements.label: Blue gradient background
elements.description: A smooth blue gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: A bold, stylized logo with the text 'FluxStream' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Circular app screenshot
elements.description: A circular shape representing an app screenshot, positioned in the center.

elements.label: Square app screenshot
elements.description: A square shape representing another app screenshot, also centered in the ad.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: A small circular decorative icon located at the top left of the ad.

elements.label: Trending text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Watch what's trending', displayed in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: Cancellation notice
elements.description: Text that states 'Cancel anytime', positioned below the trending text.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: Another small circular decorative icon located towards the bottom center.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon positioned in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom that reads 'Start now', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The main headline 'FluxStream' is bold and stands out at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Start now text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Start now', located at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, clean and modern, FluxStream logo, call to action.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by app screenshots in the center, and the CTA at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Watch what's trending, Cancel anytime, FluxStream, Start now
